author: zeruhur
description: A plugin for recording and tracking solo tabletop RPG sessions using a standardized notation system. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Roberto Bisceglie
manifest.description: A plugin for recording and tracking solo tabletop RPG sessions using a standardized notation system.
manifest.name: Solo TTRPG Notation

name: Solo TTRPG Notation

releases.author: zeruhur
releases.description:
Initial release of Solo TTRPG Notation plugin.

Features:
- Template insertion for campaign structure
- Automatic indexing of notation elements (NPCs, locations, threads, etc.)
- Tag-based navigation and search
- Progress tracking visualization (clocks, tracks, timers)
- Campaign dashboard for overview
- Support for multiple solo RPG systems

See CHANGELOG.md for detailed information.
